Export screen — dry-run first, commit second. Staged pipeline, per-section render,
Live animated lights strip. Reacts to beats + section + theme.
The 4 other screens — Library, Drop, Analyze, Export.

Chrome: header, tool strip (nav), library rail, status bar, tweaks panel.
Shared state, theme palettes, helpers, tweak mode.
Theme picker — the north-star interactive screen.
Review timeline screen — scrub, play, raw detector tracks.

.claude/worktrees/049-section-preview/sr.description: Analysis result cache keyed by MD5 of the source audio file.
CLI entry point for xlight-analyze.
T015: JSON serialisation and deserialisation for AnalysisResult.
Interactive wizard for sequence generation.
Global song library index stored at ~/.xlight/library.json.
Centralized logging for xlight-analyze — writes to ~/.xlight/logs/.
Cross-environment path resolution for the xLights show directory.
Installation-wide settings stored at ~/.xlight/settings.json.
Interactive CLI wizard for configuring and launching xlight-analyze runs.
T013: MP3/WAV loader — returns mono float32 array + AudioFile metadata.
Capability detection for the hierarchy orchestrator.
Data conditioning: downsample, smooth, normalize feature curves for xLights export.
Cross-song parameter tuning framework.
Derived feature computation for L0 Special Moments.
Diversity filter — removes near-identical tracks from --top N selection.
Drum hit classifier: label each drum onset as kick, snare, or hihat.
Essentia-based audio feature extraction.
Genius lyric segment timing: fetch, parse, and align section headers to audio.
Cross-stem musical interaction analysis.
Hierarchy orchestrator: zero-flag pipeline for hierarchical music analysis.
Parallel pipeline executor: PipelineStep, DependencyGraph, ParallelRunner.
Vocal phoneme analysis: WhisperX transcription + cmudict decomposition.
Session-friendly WhisperX word/phoneme alignment wrapper (in-process first, .venv-vamp sidecar fallback); feeds singing-faces export
Automated end-to-end analysis pipeline (US7).
Multi-track live progress display for parallel pipeline execution (T031).
Core data classes for the analysis pipeline.
T016: AnalysisRunner — orchestrates all algorithm runs for a single audio file.
Quality scorer for timing tracks — category-aware with explainable breakdowns.
Scoring configuration: categories, algorithm mapping, weights, and config loading.
Representative audio segment selection for sweep optimization.
Best-of selection for hierarchy levels.
Solo region detection from per-stem energy curves.
Stem affinity table: maps each algorithm to its preferred stems with rationale.
Stem quality inspection and intelligent sweep config generation.
Stem separation: StemSet dataclass, StemSeparator, StemCache.
Song structure analysis using librosa segmentation + lyric-enhanced clustering.
Sweep matrix: comprehensive algorithm×stem×parameter sweep engine.
005: Parameter sweep runner for Vamp algorithms.
Hierarchy mark placement validator.
Quality scoring for continuous value curves (energy, spectral flux, etc.).
005: Vamp plugin parameter discovery and validation.
URL configuration
XTimingWriter: generate xLights .xtiming XML from PhonemeResult.
xLights value curve (.xvc) XML export.
T010: Abstract base class for all analysis algorithms.
T028: Librosa frequency band energy peak algorithms.
T027: Librosa beat and bar tracking algorithms.
T029: Librosa HPSS (Harmonic-Percussive Source Separation) algorithms.
T030: Librosa full-spectrum onset detection algorithm.
T031: Madmom RNN beat and downbeat tracking algorithms (optional).
Centralized algorithm registry — single source of truth for all algorithm discovery.
Aubio Vamp plugin wrappers: onset detection, tempo/beat tracking, note events.
BBC Vamp plugin wrappers: energy, spectral flux, peaks, rhythm.
T032: Vamp beat tracking algorithms — QM and BeatRoot.
Additional Vamp plugin wrappers: key detection, transcription, percussion, etc.
T035: Vamp NNLS Chroma and Chordino harmony algorithms.
T033: Vamp onset detection algorithms — QM onset detector.
T035: Vamp pYIN pitch/note algorithms.
Segmentino Vamp plugin wrapper: automatic structural segmentation.
T034: Vamp structural segmentation and tempo algorithms.
Shared helper functions for Vamp plugin algorithm wrappers.
